pageContext.name: Stimpy
pageContext.description: The Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures of Ren Hoek and Stimpson J. Cat are once again available! Bask in the glory of their detailed sculpting, interchangeable heads & hands, and awesome accessories, and weep no more. Bring some Happy, Happy, Joy, Joy into your life and secure these made-to-order 7 scale Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures- don't be an EEDIOT and miss out on them!  He's as simple as a single-color Rubik's Cube, but behind his dopey feline exterior, Stimpy is a naïve soul with a heart of some precious metal. Not gold, of course. Maybe palladium or iridium... no, not that. Ah! We've got it: Rhenium! Yep, that seems right. A heart of rhenium! Yes, it is SO a thing, just look it up, you troglodyte! Sheesh! This 7 scale highly articulated Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure of Stimpson J. Cat features premium sculpting and decoration, interchangeable heads & hands, as well as a number of detailed accessories. We know that owning this made-to-order Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure may not be for everyone, because most people are super-lame, but not YOU! You are one of the special ones who knows that if you don't have the Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures in your collection, you might as well not have a collection at all!
